title: Fix UVM static cast from a stream type

features.name: stream type with streaming operator
features.description: Code should include a streaming operator applied to an array using { << bit { } } syntax to create a stream type
features.snippet:
logic [7:0] arr[4];
auto stream = { << bit { arr }};

features.name: static cast from stream to enum type
features.description: Code should include a static cast using single quote syntax to cast a stream type result to an enum type
